mapper.insert:
insert into notice
title, content, publisher_id, type, scope, status, create_time
values
#{title}, #{content}, #{publisherId}, #{type}, #{scope}, '发布', now()
mapper.select: select n.id, n.title, n.content, n.publisher_id, t.name as publisher_name, n.create_time as publish_time, n.type, n.scope, n.status, n.create_time, n.update_time from notice n left join teacher t on n.publisher_id = t.id where n.id = #{id}
